name: Berry Lemon Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces fat-free sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 12-cup Bundt pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix and baking powder; set aside.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine the blueberries, sour cream, egg whites, oil, and lemon peel. Mix until just moistened.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes.
